card.indications: Parkinson disease; transdermal form for depression
card.mechanism: Reduces dopamine breakdown; transdermal doses may inhibit MAO-A also
card.dosing: Use the prescribed indication- and formulation-specific dose; adjust for renal/hepatic function and response.
card.routeAdministration: Verify baseline assessment and administer by the ordered route using formulation-specific directions.
card.contraindications: Avoid serious hypersensitivity; use caution when organ impairment or interacting therapy increases risk.
card.interactions: Review prescription, OTC, and herbal products for additive toxicity or altered drug levels.
card.monitoring: Blood pressure, mental status, interactions, motor response
card.patientTeaching: Take exactly as directed; do not stop abruptly unless instructed. Report severe or unusual symptoms promptly.
card.nutrition: Follow condition-specific diet guidance; maintain hydration unless restricted and avoid alcohol when unsafe.
